none.justification: Finds the correct `struct redisObject` definition and the `robj`/`kvobj` typedef aliasing, and identifies `refcount`, both sentinel constants, `OBJ_FIRST_SPECIAL_REFCOUNT`, and `iskvobj`'s zero-free-path role. It overstates `metabits` as indirectly refcount-related, but the required GT elements are all present and `lru` is not listed as a refcount field.

ccodegraph.justification: Correctly finds the struct/aliases and covers `refcount`, `OBJ_SHARED_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_STATIC_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_FIRST_SPECIAL_REFCOUNT`, and `iskvobj`. However it explicitly treats `metabits` as a refcount-behavior field and even labels `lru` as relevant when `iskvobj` is set in the struct excerpt, which conflicts with the GT warning that `metabits`/`lru` are not refcount semantics.

lsp.justification: Correct on the struct location, alias relationship, `refcount`, both special sentinel values, `OBJ_FIRST_SPECIAL_REFCOUNT`, and `iskvobj`'s deallocation-path role. It adds `metabits`, `type`, and `encoding` as part of the refcount-zero behavior, despite the GT saying those are not refcount-governing fields, so it has a real over-inclusion gap.
